content.text:
```mdl
@ Contract NDLI No Align Dev 10 NDA 16 – Confidentiality and Non‑Disclosure Agreement
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_10_nda_16

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain model
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
type Party = {
    name: string                # legal name of the party
}

type ConfidentialInfo = {
    id: string                  # unique identifier for the piece of information
    is_confidential: bool       # true if the information is marked/confidential
}

type Agreement = {
    terminated: bool            # true once the agreement has been terminated
    returned_confidential: bool # true if the receiving party has returned the info
    destroyed_confidential: bool# true if the receiving party has destroyed the info
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities – stable public objects that can be aligned with other standards
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
entity agreement: Agreement
entity receiving_party: Party
entity disclosing_party: Party
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInfo

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Hypothesis expressed as a normative rule
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Hypothesis: Receiving Party shall destroy or return some Confidential Information
# upon the termination of the Agreement (Article 2.07, Article 3.09).
rule O return_or_destroy_on_termination:
    agreement.terminated implies
        (agreement.returned_confidential or agreement.destroyed_confidential) always
```
